name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate diagram-first Excalidraw visuals from pasted text, with a short $card entrypoint.

interface.longDescription: Turn pasted text into English-default or user-selected-language diagram-first Excalidraw visuals with concise embedded talk tracks. Use the short $card skill for general text, or the SDE preset for interview prep.
defaultPrompt: Use $card to turn this text into a diagram-first Excalidraw visual and link only.
Draw a decision tree or comparison map instead of a long script block.
